items.title:
RT by @UN: Despite the ceasefire announced 8 months ago, Gaza still faces profound uncertainty & immense human suffering.

It’s time to get serious about the only credible way forward:

An end to the occupation & a two-State solution, where two independent, sovereign, democratic States – Israel & Palestine – live side-by-side in peace & security.
items.summary:
